name: Reverse Nodes in k-Group
description: Given the head of a linked list, reverse the nodes k at a time and return the modified list. If the number of remaining nodes is less than k, leave them as-is. You may not alter the values, only the nodes.
constraints: The number of nodes is n. 1 <= k <= n <= 5000. 0 <= Node.val <= 1000.

performance.stress_intent: exercise long lists and varied k that punish repeated group tail rescans instead of one pass with local block reversal
